_comment: Template for tools/knowledge_data.local.json (which is gitignored). Replace the placeholder IPs, hostnames, account names, sites and IDs with your real values. The real file is never committed.

infra.title: Azure dev environment (<resource-group>)
infra.content: Azure dev ERP in resource group <resource-group>, region <region>. App VM <app-vm-name> (<sku>) public <APP_PUBLIC_IP> / private <APP_PRIVATE_IP> runs Spring Boot erp-backend on :8080 behind nginx :80. DB VM <db-vm-name> (<sku>) public <DB_PUBLIC_IP> / private <DB_PRIVATE_IP> runs MySQL 8 (database <db-name>) on :3306, reachable only from the VNet. SSH user <ssh-user>. URL http://<APP_PUBLIC_IP>/ ; health http://<APP_PUBLIC_IP>/actuator/health. Monitored by <monitoring-host>.

history.title: Infrastructure provisioning history
history.content: All ERP environments were provisioned with Terraform. Terraform state lives in an azurerm storage account <state-storage-account>, container <state-container>, key pattern erp-system/<cloud>/<env>/terraform.tfstate. App config is applied by Ansible.
